summary:
The available literature does not provide sufficient evidence comparing different bracket-ligature combinations regarding their impact on orthodontic space closure over three months. Thus, based on current findings, there is insufficient information to determine if such combinations influence closing speed or effectiveness during this period.\boxed{\text{No}}

Note: This summary strictly adheres only to clinically relevant facts from the provided text without adding external assumptions.
